sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-01-01'), (2, DATE '2023-02-15');
SELECT id, event_date, dayofyear(event_date) AS day_of_year FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2023-03-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, dayofyear(event_date) AS day_of_year FROM test_dates WHERE dayofyear(event_date) > 31;
